description_long: This is a brightly colored beverage can with a playful, cartoonish dragon illustration wrapping around its surface. The can features a green and light green color scheme, with bubble graphics and bold, contrasting text. The front displays the product name 'BRIAN GOLD' in large, white and gold letters, accompanied by a pink 'NEW' burst graphic and the word 'SODA' above the dragon's head. The back of the can includes a detailed nutrition facts panel and a block of placeholder text for ingredients, as well as the phrase 'POWERFUL NATURAL FLAVOR.' The can is cylindrical with a slightly indented top and bottom, typical of standard soft drink cans. The overall design is eye-catching and whimsical, likely intended to appeal to a youthful audience.
description: A vibrant green soda can featuring a cartoon dragon, bold product name 'BRIAN GOLD', and playful bubble graphics. Includes nutrition facts and promotional 'NEW' burst on the front.
description_view_0: Shows the side of the can with the dragon illustration and partial nutrition facts panel visible.
description_view_1: Displays the back of the can with the full nutrition facts panel, ingredients text, and 'POWERFUL NATURAL FLAVOR' slogan.
description_view_2: Highlights the dragon's face, part of the product name, and the transition between the front and side graphics.
description_view_3: Presents the front of the can with the dragon's head, 'NEW' burst, 'SODA', and the prominent 'BRIAN GOLD' text.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, including calories, ingredients, and other standard information.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A pink 'NEW' burst graphic is present on the front, next to the dragon illustration.
